/CAL:MODIFY RELEASE CONDITINS & POSS CJC REFERRAL/INTC/X:PD IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONSAT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD: THIS CASE IS REFERRED TO CJC FOR ASSESSMENT/TRANS POLK: FOR CJC ASSESSMENT ON 11-30-21 AT 1:30 P,M,/DOP/
/CAL: MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/INTC/ORNAS/X:DEFENDANT IS RELEASED TO TAKE CARE OF JUVENILE WARRANT/VD:11-23-21/LD:01-18-22/CONTD:MODIFY RELEASECONDITIONS & POSSIBLE CJC REFERRAL/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:01-18-22/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIALMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATEDPICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/CONTD CJC ASSESSMENT/CTORD: THIS CASE IS REFERRED TO CJC FOR ASSESSMENT/TRANS POLK: FOR CJC ASSESSMENT ON DATE AT 1:30 P,M,/DOP/
/CAL:CJC PRG RPT AND PTC/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:1,000/BWNUM:1ST/X: 2 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
